summary: Validated S1-03 scope with targeted regressions, build/lint checks, and production UI integration. Source-level S1-03 implementation is present and targeted regression tests pass, but production booking behavior still indicates stale runtime (no get_available_slots RPC traffic observed, static-like slot behavior remains).

minor.issue: Regression file test_install_build_pipeline_regression.py failed: package-lock lucide-react-native version mismatch (0.468.0 vs expected 1.25.0), and vercel/workflow still use legacy-peer-deps fallback instead of clean npm ci path.

integration_issues.issue: After real login and entering booking screen, no /rest/v1/rpc/get_available_slots request was captured while selecting service/professional/date. Time chips behavior looked static/stale and confirm stayed disabled.

action_items: Redeploy latest web bundle for S1-03 and revalidate network traces on production ensuring /rest/v1/rpc/get_available_slots is called from booking flow.
After redeploy, re-test booking path: explore -> profile -> Agendar agora; confirm service/barber/date triggers loading and dynamic RPC-backed slots.
Align release pipeline artifacts: sync package-lock with package.json and remove legacy-peer-deps fallback from vercel/workflow if policy is clean install.
critical_code_review_comments: src/app/[slug]/booking.tsx is >700 lines and should be split into focused modules/hooks to reduce regression risk.
S1-03 SQL tests exist but were not executed against DB in this container (no local psql/Supabase CLI execution path observed in this run).
Production/runtime behavior is currently inconsistent with repository source and regression assertions, indicating deployment mismatch risk.

success_rate.backend: 84% (21/25 for selected suite; 100% on targeted S1-03 + booking-merge regressions)
success_rate.frontend: 60% (login/profile/booking navigation works; availability RPC integration not observed on production)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Use client credentials from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Reproduce on https://cut-sync.vercel.app: login -> Ver perfil e agendar -> Agendar agora -> select service/professional/date and capture /rest/v1/rpc/get_available_slots requests. Current production still appears stale versus source.
rca of the issue: Reproduction: in production, booking screen is reachable and interactive, but selecting service/professional/date did not emit get_available_slots RPC during this run. The repository source and targeted tests assert migration/hook usage correctly, so most likely RCA is stale deployed frontend bundle or runtime configuration mismatch rather than current code in repository.
test_credentials: Read from /app/memory/test_credentials.md and used client account for UI integration validation.
